task.title: Shift dark-mode footer from black to Relay blue

events.content: Shifted dark footer styling to the existing Relay blue gradient: Shifted dark footer styling to the existing Relay blue gradient

raw.question: Shifted dark footer styling to the existing Relay blue gradient
raw.chosen: Shifted dark footer styling to the existing Relay blue gradient
raw.reasoning: The footer tokens lived in brand.css, so the cleanest change was to swap the dark footer background from near-black to the same blue range already used elsewhere in the dark theme and tint the divider line to match.

retrospective.summary: Adjusted the dark-mode footer to use a Relay blue gradient and blue-tinted divider instead of a near-black fill, and verified the web build still passes.
